title: Thinking Objects
description: A mod where you can see thoughts of the mobs and get their dreams!
body:
This mod is about getting the "thoughts" of the mobs you are finding in your way. When you see a thought and you click on them, it will spawn a new item of that kind of thought. So you can take it!
Here is a gif of this mod working: https://giphy.com/gifs/Fxpsc7zRL1qAOPBLeL
